chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4813 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing on CMA No.20488/2022 3. For hearing of CMA No.20489/2022 4. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Pirzada, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh DSP Irshad Imam and DSP Sajjad ul Hasnain The petitioner seeks to assert rights in immoveable property and the same is not amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. Even otherwise perusal of the prayer clauses demonstrates that petition is in nature of harassment petition and the same is misconceived in view of Division Bench judgment of this court reported as PLD 2019 168 Sindh. In view of the foregoing this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
